extraction.one_line_summary: PINOT attacked late on the final climb to Asiago, won with 10-second bonus, DUMOULIN lost 15 seconds and the pink jersey calculations tight within 75 seconds across top five.
tactical_patterns: ZAKARIN forced tempo surges multiple times before the finish climb, softening DUMOULIN before PINOT's decisive late attack.
QUINTANA required repeated wheel-following efforts rather than initiating attacks, signaling depleted form relative to ZAKARIN and PINOT.
POZZOVIVO bridged to winning move and contested sprint, teams underestimated his TT ability at 75-second deficit.
DUMOULIN isolated without teammates on final climb, lost 15 seconds through accumulation rather than single explosive attack.

rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: attacked late on final climb with enough reserves to win sprint and take 10-second bonus against direct GC rivals
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: initiated multiple accelerations to fracture the group, finished second on stage showing dual threat of attacks and sprint speed
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: isolated and lost 15 seconds to main rivals, showed vulnerability on lumpy finishes when team cannot control
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: followed wheels effectively but never initiated decisive attacks, same time as winner but required teammates to chase
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: bridged to lead group and nearly won stage at 75-second GC deficit, underrated time trial threat
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: remained in contact with favorites throughout attacks but showed no offensive capability
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: distanced when ZAKARIN accelerated early, unable to follow initial surge before final climb
